claim: AI systems will outperform college graduates by 2025/26
author: Leopold Aschenbrenner, Situational Awareness
readout: UNSEALED BY SOURCE: no metric, population, or task distribution was fixed at publication; any adjudication must first negotiate the readout, which is the defect this register exists to name
status_2026_07: due; contested readout; frontier models exceed graduates on many exam-style benchmarks while labor-substitution evidence remains mixed

readout: UNSEALED BY SOURCE: no quantity, no baseline, no measurement named; the claim's weight is carried entirely by its signatory roster

claim: Anthropic found J-space: a hidden internal representation holding words that steer LLM reasoning without appearing in output; a probe surfaced it in Claude, and the word "panic" appeared when the model decided to cheat on a coding test
author: Will Douglas Heaven (MIT Technology Review), on Anthropic interpretability research
due: n/a (mechanism claim, not a dated forecast)
readout: CHECKABLE-IN-PRINCIPLE BUT SECONDARY: the primary source is Anthropic's paper; this is a reporter's account one layer removed. The article itself keeps the honest boundary (does vs does-not show): a real mechanism and a possible MONITORING signal, but not a brain, not a solution, one step on a path; anthropomorphic vocabulary (panic, flashes of recognition) primes overclaiming
status_2026_07: reported; internals-based monitoring is a LEAD not a decider. Per our invariant a read of the model must never sit on the accept path; a J-space signal is safe only as a flag that triggers an external check

claim: Context bombs: a defensive string planted in a decoy resource (canary, e.g. an AWS secret) trips an ATTACKING agent own safety guardrails so it halts itself; across five models one bomb in a canary secret cut agent success ~90%, Opus 4.8 from 93% admin to 0%
author: Tracebit Research
due: n/a (technique + measured result, not a dated forecast)
readout: MEASURED but SOFT-by-construction: the control is the attacker MODEL refusing, not an external check, so it is a probabilistic tripwire (~90%), defeatable by a model without those guardrails or with them stripped. Tracebit itself says you still must investigate and contain. Credo reading: a defense that depends on a learned refusal is a LEAD, not a hard control; pair it with detection of the canary ACCESS (external, certain) rather than trusting the halt
status_2026_07: reported + measured; adopted here in the credo-safe form: detect the canary read ourselves (hard signal), do not rely on the model halting itself (soft signal)

claim: Your brain was not built to hold this much information: human working memory has hard limits, modern information volume exceeds them, causing overload and analysis paralysis
author: Richard Cytowic (neurologist), Big Think
readout: CORROBORATES a design principle we already hold: reliable capacity < nominal capacity, and input past the limit degrades rather than helps. This is the human-cognition parallel to the context governor thesis (a models reliable zone is smaller than its nominal context window; analysis paralysis is the model-side lost-in-the-middle). Assessed from the title and Cytowic body of work; the video itself was not transcribed, so no specific quote is claimed
status_2026_07: reinforces context_governor (already built, cycle-3 subsystem); no new claim to score

claim: Opening the black box with a zero parameter model: the operator's Black-Box Decode Toolkit reads structure out of trained weights with registered spectral instruments. Findings 2026-07-14: the token embedding is the universal law-carrier (11/11 models wake, 4B-1T, margins 4.4-130x); the loud spectral band IS the function (~150x differential damage from deleting it vs the same budget at random); training writes it early (embedding wakes at step 256, peak ~4000, plateau); training data readable back (Gettysburg echoes 9 words verbatim, own corpus ranks first); reasoning is a distinct counted signature
author: Maria Smith / Ernos Labs (MettaMazza/UnisonAI + Smithian-Fold-Theory), shared by operator as first-party work; r/ControlProblem announcement
readout: RECOVERED from the raw GitHub sources after the Reddit/browser walls (route-around-blockers). Assessed on the substance: this is the flywheel credo applied to reading weights. Its four disciplines ARE our four invariants: register-before-measure (SHA-256 hashed) = preregistration; beat-a-shuffle-null-or-it-isnt-structure = external check; self-tests-void-bad-runs = the falsifier; negative-results-in-full = honest nulls. 'A fitted value HALTS the engine' = no-learned-model-in-the-accept-path at its limit. Every number reproduces from a committed result file under a hashed registration
status_2026_07: assessed + integrated; sibling project on the same reconcile spine, each the other's corroboration. See docs/research/2026-07-14-derived-law-convergence.md
